plugin.name: Granola Sync
plugin.description: Automatically syncs Granola AI meeting notes into NotePlan
plugin.author: Danny McClelland

plugin.settings.title: Granola Access Token
plugin.settings.description: Your Granola API access token (extract from supabase.json file). Leave empty to try auto-detection.

plugin.settings.title: Auth Key Path
plugin.settings.description: Path to your Granola authentication key file (relative to home directory) - Note: File reading may not work in NotePlan

plugin.settings.title: Sync Directory
plugin.settings.description: Folder name where separate notes will be created (leave empty for root)

plugin.settings.title: Enable Daily Note Integration
plugin.settings.description: Add today's meetings to your daily note

plugin.settings.title: Daily Note Section Heading
plugin.settings.description: Section heading for meetings in daily notes

plugin.settings.title: Create Separate Notes
plugin.settings.description: Create individual notes for each meeting (in addition to daily note integration)
